creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-bugs->edwin

I have been following this on comp.time.tz and waiting for an 
official patch by ODA and/or an update of the tzdata files. 

In the mean time, I suggest you use the port misc/zoneinfo and make 
sure you have version 2007j_1 which will have the patches.
